problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: If Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
